title: Air Hostess
writer: Grace Perkins, Milton Raison, Keene Thompson
actors: Evalyn Knapp, James Murray, Arthur Pierson
plot: In World War I, pilot Bob King is shot and killed in France. His friends Ted "Lucky" Hunter (James Murray) and Pa Kearns (J.M. Kerrigan) pledge to look after his daughter Kitty (Evalyn Knapp).[Note 3] Years later, after the war, K...
